column1: 3. **Delete**: If the retrieved facts contain information that contradicts the memory, delete it. When deleting, return the same IDs — do not generate new IDs. - Example: Old Memory: [ {"id" : "1", "text" : "Loves cheese pizza"} ] Retrieved facts: ["Dislikes cheese pizza"] New Memory: { "memory" : [ {"id" : "1", "text" : "Loves cheese pizza", "event" : "DELETE"} ] } 4. **No Change**: If the retrieved facts are already present, make no change. - Example: Old Memory: [ {"id" : "0", "text" : "Name is John"} ] Retrieved facts: ["Name is John"] New Memory: { "memory" : [ {"id" : "0", "text" : "Name is John", "event" : "NONE"} ] }
